tools.name: get_ngx_market_overview
tools.description: Get a real-time overview of the Nigerian Stock Exchange (NGX). Returns the All Share Index (ASI), market capitalisation, trading volume, deals, advancers, and decliners. Use this when the user asks about the Nigerian stock market at a high level.

tools.name: get_ngx_stock_price
tools.description: Get the latest price and trading history for a specific NGX-listed stock by ticker symbol (e.g. DANGCEM, GTCO, MTNN, ZENITHBANK, ACCESSCORP). Use this when the user asks about the price of a particular Nigerian stock.

tools.name: get_ngx_all_stocks
tools.description: Get the full list of all 148+ equities listed on the NGX with current prices, daily change percent, volume, market cap, and sector.

tools.name: get_ngx_top_gainers
tools.description: Get the top gaining stocks on the NGX today, ranked by percentage price increase. Use this when the user asks which Nigerian stocks are up the most today.

tools.name: get_ngx_top_losers
tools.description: Get the top losing stocks on the NGX today, ranked by percentage price decline. Use this when the user asks which Nigerian stocks are down the most today.

tools.name: get_ngx_market_status
tools.description: Check whether the Nigerian Stock Exchange (NGX) is currently open or closed. Returns OPEN, CLOSED, or ENDOFDAY.

tools.name: get_ngx_disclosures
tools.description: Get the latest 200 corporate disclosures and regulatory announcements from NGX-listed companies — earnings, dividends, board changes, and filings.

tools.name: get_nasd_stocks
tools.description: Get all 45 equities on Nigeria's NASD OTC Securities Exchange — the over-the-counter market for unlisted and growth-stage companies.

tools.name: get_african_exchanges
tools.description: Get a list of all African stock exchanges — NGX, GSE, NSE, JSE, BRVM, DSE, LuSE, EGX, CSE, BSE, SEM, ZSE, USE — with index levels, daily change, stocks count, and status.

tools.name: get_african_exchange
tools.description: Get detailed data for one specific African exchange by ID — index value, change, trading hours, currency, and status.

tools.name: get_african_exchange_stocks
tools.description: Get stocks on a specific African exchange with prices, change percent, volume, market cap, and sector. Supports filtering and sorting.

tools.name: get_african_exchange_movers
tools.description: Get the top gainers and/or losers on a specific African exchange today.

tools.name: get_pan_african_movers
tools.description: Get the biggest stock movers across ALL African exchanges combined — top gainers and losers by % change from every covered market today.

tools.name: get_african_indices
tools.description: Get all major African market indices in one call — NGX ASI, GSE-CI, NASI, J203, BRVM-CI, LASI and more. Includes index values, daily change, and YTD performance.

tools.name: get_african_policy_rates
tools.description: Get current central bank policy rates and latest inflation for 18 African economies — Nigeria live from CBN — with source institution and URL per value.

tools.name: get_country_macro_indicators
tools.description: Get all macro indicators for one African country (ISO-2 code). Nigeria returns the live CBN set: MPR, T-bill, interbank, lending rates, and headline/food/core inflation.

tools.name: get_macro_history
tools.description: Monthly history for an African macro indicator. Nigeria reaches back to January 2006 (policy_rate, inflation, inflation_food, inflation_core, treasury_bill_rate and more).

tools.name: get_market_open_status
tools.description: Is an African exchange open right now? Returns reason (hours/weekend/public holiday with name), local time, session, and next open/close. Handles Sun–Thu markets and holidays.

tools.name: get_african_yield_curve
tools.description: Current government yield curve for an African country — latest T-bill/bond auction per tenor with stop rates and yields. 13 countries covered.

tools.name: get_african_fx_rates
tools.description: Current USD rates for ~40 African currencies, each with as-of timestamp and source.

tools.name: get_african_banks
tools.description: Look up African banks and mobile-money institutions by country (NIBSS sort codes, SWIFT/BIC, USSD) or a single bank code (e.g. 058 = GTBank).

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_african_policy_rates · Public sink: get_ngx_market_overview.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_african_policy_rates · Public sink: get_ngx_market_overview

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
